description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 8. Gap markers and session-phase organization**.

Goal: detect meaningful inactivity gaps and render resumed-work markers so chronology stays legible in longer-running single-session histories.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/format.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts`

Worker notes:
- use the improved temporal foundation from Tier 1 rather than inventing a separate chronology mechanism
- keep markers lightweight and human-readable
- this is about session gaps, not thread IDs or cross-resource organization
title: Detect and render long inactivity gaps and resumed-work markers
